examples: The witch foretold that she would marry a prince.
Please your Majesty to give the circumstance that solemn weight which is its due, seeing it was foretold.
That which I foretold has come to pass.
And yet, of course, it has come to pass, just as Mr Santer foretold.
We know these men well by now, and we could have foretold their reactions to a cage.
